title: No More Elytra
description: Stops Elytra from generating on End Ships
body:
A simple datapack to disable the generation of Elytra in End Ships. It does not disable the use of Elytra, nor remove them from players' inventories, it just stops them from generating and nothing more.

For most servers this should be enough since End Ships are the only source of Elytra in the vanilla game, but if you have mods that allow the obtaining of elytra through different means, this datapack is not for you. Otherwise, it's perfect!

**This datapack was made for RMC25, a server created as part of the Reformation community, which you can support on our patreon.**
